violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the back storage room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025
The following was observed in poor repair -Chest cooler #2 lid -Chest freezer #2 gasket -Chest freezer #3 lid Equipment must be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the 2 door lowboy have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025
Chest cooler #2, #3, and majority of chest freezers have an accumulation of ice buildup. Establishment is to run a defrost on units. New Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration unit. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024

Working containers of flavoring syrups are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the black refrigerator and chest refrigerator have an accumulation of dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024
Utensil sink observed with an air break. An air gap is required. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024
The drain to the utensil wash was observed with a clogged drain. Per PIC, plumber was scheduled for service later today. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items (oven range) were observed in the facility. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
The ceiling in the storage area directly over chest freezers is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2024

The following areas in the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris: -floor/wall junctures -wall behind 3-bay sink The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2024
